test_scenario: Explain where Phase 3 exploration outputs (summary, files.csv, open-questions) are stored in GitHub

storage_architecture.hierarchy: Parent Issue → phase:exploration child issue → artifact subissues
storage_architecture.canonical_storage: GitHub issues and artifact subissues (not local markdown)

exploration_summary.content: Consolidated exploration summary using exploration-summary template
exploration_summary.lifecycle: Created Phase 3 Step 5, closed Phase 3 Step 9 when complete

files_csv.lifecycle: Created Phase 3 Step 6, CLOSED Phase 3 Step 7 immediately after complete
files_csv.why_github: So other agents can resume from GitHub alone

open_questions.lifecycle: Created Phase 3 Step 8, LEFT OPEN at Phase 3 end, updated Phase 4 (research), finalized Phase 5, CLOSED Phase 5 Step 8

github_issue_hierarchy.linking_mechanism: GitHub sub-issue relationship (gh api graphql addSubIssue mutation), fallback to Parent: #N body reference

no_local_files.statement: Phase 0 is the only phase that writes durable repo-local workflow artifacts. For Phases 1–11, GitHub issues are canonical; do not create .coding-workflow/work/<slug>/... artifacts.
no_local_files.implication_for_phase_3: NO local files; all artifacts live in GitHub issues

skill_specification_references: issue-hierarchy.md (GitHub hierarchy tree and linking flow)
result_summary: The skill clearly specifies that Phase 3 exploration outputs live entirely in GitHub as a hierarchy: exploration summary in the phase:exploration issue, files.csv as a closed artifact subissue, and open-questions as an open artifact subissue. No local markdown files are created per work item.
key_insights: Exploration summary: phase:exploration child issue (closed at end of Phase 3)
files.csv: artifact subissue under exploration (closed Phase 3 Step 7)
open-questions: artifact subissue under exploration (left open, updated through Phase 5)
All stored in GitHub; no local .coding-workflow/work/<slug>/ files
GitHub sub-issue linking via GraphQL mutation, fallback to Parent: #N reference
Resume-safe: fresh session can find all artifacts via parent issue → child issues → artifact subissues
